text_block_list.text:
I woke up earlier than usual this morning, so I
decide to take a healthy stroll along the river,
when...

Mihono Bourbon comes rushing up the riverbank
with astounding speed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Twenty reps of incline running complete. Thirty
reps remaining.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Father said running up riverbank slopes is
good training for the legs. This has been my
training regimen since before I entered Tracen.

However, I have a different training regimen
planned for the afternoon. We can't afford her
overexerting herself in the morning.
choice_data_list:
(But maybe she really wants to exert her
energy...)

(But maybe she really wants to exert her
energy...)
(Might be time to get her to stop.)

text_block_list.text:

planned for the afternoon. We can't afford her
overexerting herself in the morning.

text_block_list.text:
She continues her training until the last possible
moment before she must return to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Process complete. Increased leg strength
confirmed.

Seeing how easily she was able to complete her
exercises really drives home to me just how much
she's improved.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Next task... School commences in thirty minutes. I
can still... make it...

She's completely depleted her energy doing her
morning exercises, so I help her get to the
academy.

I tell her to end her morning exercise for today,
considering she has more training in the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Orders confirmed. Updating top priorities.
Switching to energy conservation mode in
preparation for the afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Energy output quota projected to be fulfilled
during afternoon training.

For her sake, I'll have to make afternoon training
more rigorous than usual.
